hero.subheadline: Premium grooming for those who know the difference. Walk in, sit down, walk out sharper — by appointment or by chance.

team.headline: Meet Our
team.subline: Every one of our barbers brings a distinct edge. Pick your style, pick your pro.

closing.quote1: Your chair is waiting. Your best look is one appointment

locations.headline: Our
locations.homeVisitCashNote: Cash payment on the day. No card required at booking.
locations.subline: Visit us at the salon or let us come to you — your call.
locations.homeVisitBody: We travel anywhere within Agadir city limits. Just provide your address at booking.
locations.homeVisitHoursBody: Sat–Thu · 9:00 – 17:00. Same barbers, same quality, at your door.

payment.cashInstructions: Pay {total} in cash at your appointment. Cancellations are free; let us know in advance.

barber.title: Choose a Berber
barber.noServices: This barber has no services listed yet.
barber.noHomeBarbers: No barbers are available for home visits. Please choose a salon location.

service.title: Choose a Service
service.pickOneOrMore: Pick one or more services, then tap Continue.
service.thisBarberNoServices: This barber has no services listed yet.

time.title: Choose a Time
time.noSlotsAvailable: No slots available on this day — try another date.
time.noWindowAvailability: No availability for this service in the next 30 days. Try a shorter service or a different barber.

details.title: Your Details
details.phoneFormat: Format: +212 6XX XXX XXX or 06XX XXX XXX
details.afterTransferPrefix: After you transfer, send the receipt to WhatsApp
details.afterTransferSuffix: Your booking stays pending until we confirm the payment.
details.afterTransfer: After you transfer, send the receipt to WhatsApp {phone}. Your booking stays pending until we confirm the payment.

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed
confirmation.headline: You're all set!
confirmation.message: Your appointment has been received. We'll reach out to confirm within a few hours.
confirmation.dontForgetReceipt: Don't forget to send your transfer receipt to WhatsApp {phone}.

validation.phoneRequired: Please enter a valid Moroccan phone number.
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid Moroccan phone number.
validation.bankTransferUnavailable: Bank transfer isn’t available right now. Please choose cash.
validation.slotTaken: That time was just booked. Please pick another slot.
validation.saveFailed: Couldn’t save your booking. Please try again.

toast.locationDenied: Location access denied. Please enable location in your browser settings.
toast.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

homePanel.tapMapHint: Tap the map or drag the pin to your address

footer.tagline: Premium barbershop experience in the heart of Agadir. Walk-ins welcome, appointments preferred. Cash only — always.

beforeAfter.headline: Before ·
beforeAfter.subheadline: Real chairs. Real clients. Drag to see the difference a Desart cut makes.
beforeAfter.sliderAria: Before-and-after comparison slider. Use left and right arrow keys to reveal more of each image.

items.quote: Best fade I've had in Agadir. Clean lines, no rush, exactly what I asked for.
items.name: Youssef B.

items.quote: Walked in without an appointment and still got the full treatment. Professional from start to finish.
items.name: Karim E.

items.quote: The beard sculpting is next level. I've been coming back every two weeks since 2022.
items.name: Amine T.
